titleStmt.title: SII 8.710: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 710. (A.R. No. 394 of 1903). ON THE NORTH BASE OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . cakalapuvaṉacca kkaravattikaḷ śrīkopperuñciṅkatevarkku yāṇṭu 5- Aiñcāvatu makara nāyaṟṟu tiyatiThere is space here for two digits. ṉāl
taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr miciṉakkuṭi kauciyaṉ tirukkiḷāñceriuṭaiyāṉ Utāracenaṉai mutukaṇṇākauṭaiya Ivar pirāmaṇi ti
ricciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār nāyakanācciyeṉ Ivvūr kavuṇiyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā(ṉ)ṉukku nāṉ nilavilaippiramāṇa
tiṭṭu kuṭuttaparicāvatu . Iṟṟaināḷāl viṟṟu kuṭukkum Eṉ nilam Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai maturāntakapaperiḷamaināṭṭup paḷḷipaṭaiyāṉa vi
kkiramacoḻanallūrpāl śrīcuntaracoḻavatikku kiḻakku śrīkaṇṭarātittaṉvāykkā(l)lukku teṟku kaṇṇā(ā)ṟṟu 1- catirattu
nāṉ muṉnāḷil strīdhanam peṟṟuṭaiye(ṉ)nāyum vilaikoṇṭu Uṭaiye(ṉ)nāyum Eṉṉutāy nāṉ Aṉupavittuvarukiṟa
naṭṭaṉnālumā veṉṟum kuḷakuṟai Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam nālu māvukkum pittucey Eṉṟu peruṭaiya ni
lattu teṟkaṭaiya Innilattoṭe cera Orumāvukkum Āka nilam nālumāvukkum Ellai tillaivaṉamuṭaiya parame
śva(śva) ri nilattirkku kiḻakkum māṭalaṉṣpace for about fifteen letters is left unengraved. maṇi Āvvāḷ nilattukkut teṟkum kiḻakkum
vi�This seems to be a contrastion.centaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ nilattiṉukku teṟkum Aṟutikku meṟku Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā
r palaivaravai nilattukku merkkum vaṭakkum piṭāri vaṭavāyilcelvi nilattiṉukku vaṭakkum Āka Icainta Innāṉkellaiyu
m Uḷpaṭak karuttaḷavāka mikuti kuṟai vuḷaṭaṅka vanta nilam kiḻaikuḷattil nālumāvukkum kuḻi Eṭṭum Orumāvukku nilaThe continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 8.710 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
